rules.description: Merge and auto-merge actions require all reported and required checks to be successful.
rules.message: Required checks are missing, pending, or failing.

rules.description: DarkFactory must not force-push worker branches.
DarkFactory must not bypass branch protection or use administrative merge overrides.
DarkFactory must not emit known secret material to logs or comments.
rules.message: Secret material was detected in an output path.

rules.description: DarkFactory must not dispatch, push, merge, or auto-merge in parked repositories.
rules.message: Parked repositories are not eligible for DarkFactory actions.

rules.description: When a repository has a dev branch, DarkFactory work actions must target dev.
rules.message: Worker actions must target dev when the target repository has a dev branch.
